## What happened?

<!-- Describe the problem clearly. What did you expect to happen, and what actually happened? -->

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to…
2. Click on…
3. See…

## Screenshots or screen recording

<!-- If applicable, attach a screenshot or recording. -->

## Environment

- **Browser:** (e.g. Chrome 124, Safari 17)
- **Device:** (e.g. desktop, mobile)
- **Screen width:** (approximate, if relevant)
- **URL:** (e.g. https://p4dem.github.io/ai-democracy-map/ or staging)

## Severity

- [ ] Blocks use of the tool entirely
- [ ] Affects a specific feature but tool is still usable
- [ ] Minor visual / cosmetic issue
